items.title:
[正面] Где скрывался этот шедевр от меня все эти годы??
Е...
items.summary:
Где скрывался этот шедевр от меня все эти годы??
Если бы не коллаборация с Саей я бы даже не узнала о её существовании.

ПЛЮСЫ:
+Бесплатно
+Гринд не жопоразрывающий
+ Интересная история([spoiler]стеклище ♥♥♥♥♥♥, спасибо очень вкусно[/spoiler])
+Есть руссификация ии
+Красивая рисовка
+Музыка
+Потрясающая атмосфера, всё пропитано лавкрафтом
+Помимо прохождения сюжетки всегда есть чем заняться
+"Стены" по скорости прохождения не сильно ощущаются
+Игра щедро осыпает редкими персонажами и ресурсами
+Кроссплатформа
+Коллаборация с Саей
+Пластичность стиля игры, различные комбинации очень освежают геймплей
+Достаточно легкая сложность, чем-то напомнила darkest dungeon, но в разы проще
 +Отличный баланс между бодрыми карточными боями и увлекательной вн

МИНУСЫ:
-Ценник на донатную валюту, реал выходит слишком дорогим
-Отсутсвие значка, карточек, фонов, рамок и тд. Пожалуйста добавьте, такие красивые арты так и просятся для оформления профиля!

items.title: [正面] I played for the first time just a month after the...
items.summary: I played for the first time just a month after the game came out. I didnt play for long as I only logged in for 2 days as the gameplay didnt capture me at the time. I thought the game was charming and had a good artstyle but It stuck with me. After I saw a video about the anniversary and how the game was going to shut down and how the players saved the game, I decided to give the game another shot.... and I'm so happy I did. This game is so good, I wished I played it more back before the anniversary but I have very quickly 5x my playtime and completed the 2nd chapter and I will say. You will like this game if you're okay with a little death and slay the spire gameplay. Morimens.... is something to be remembered.

items.title: [正面] One of, if not, the DARKEST Gacha game I've ever p...
items.summary:
One of, if not, the DARKEST Gacha game I've ever played storywise.

Gameplay-wise if you like Slay the Spire you'll feel right at home with Morimens. Easy to learn and some characters have very unique playstyles, not including the extra mechanics you get depending on what factions you use. It's not the most complex deckbuilder out there, but it will definitely give you a decent challenge the further you are into a game (at the time this is just from what I've seen other players experience)

Story-wise, this game is DARK. Like not your typical gacha "this has light horror elements but it's just more spooky than scary", this game will not hold any punches when it comes to the story. You're going to grow attached to characters, you're going to see how bleak the world around them is, and on top of that, the world is built on top of a beautiful Lovecraftian horror theme, and they pull it off amazingly with the art and character designs, and the music is incredible as well!

Also despite the game being a Gacha, it's EXTREMELY generous where you don't need to spend a dime on the game and you're constantly showered with pulls, as well as collab characters being permanent editions, and the game has little to no FOMO because of that alongside limited banner characters getting added to the standard banner. You can basically get the entire roster of characters just grinding the game and experiencing the incredible story.

This game was on the brink of death/EOS NUMEROUS times, and it constantly got saved by an extremely dedicated community to the point that the dev team was able to start a brand new arc AND collab with one of the most popular visual novels of all time, AND promised an offline version for if and when the game would end.

Hands down my most favorite gacha game I've ever played, and I HIGHLY recommend it!

items.title: [正面] El juego es muy bueno. Tiene una buena historia, u...
items.summary: El juego es muy bueno. Tiene una buena historia, una gran banda sonora que te podes quedar minimo una hora escuchando sin hacer nada (ya lo hice), el juego no es como otros gachas, este ayuda mucho al jugador a progresar sin meter transacciones abusivas para el progreso. La verdad 10/10
